creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

- bump USE_PYTHON to 2.5+ - since it now requires 2.5+ use 
databases/py-sqlite3 instead of databases/py-pysqlite2x - while here, 
move LICENSE to proper block - remove CONFLICTS since we don't have 
other Miro version in the tree anymore - remove MAKE_ENV line as it 
automatically occurs in b.p.m
